resources.string: Allow Alats For Fone Calls Dem
Wen di backup process dey go on, abeg keep di device wey don connect normally, no use personal hotspot, and keep Wi-Fi on. Check di device condition and try am again.
Di AI Gallery backup for di device \"%1$s\" no complete. You wan disconnect di device?
You no fit use di %2$s feature wella. Abeg go %3$s (copy and paste) for your PC to download di latest version of di %1$s client.
Cast mobile videos to ya computer, and no miss every info.
Select %1$s for your PC amke e bring up di QR code.
Make e notify you once e don connect
Abeg turn on di Wi-Fi and Bluetooth for di PC wey you wan connect am to, and open di PC client. You fit visit %1$s if you won download client.
Connection don fail. Abeg try again with USB cable.
1. Use one standard cable for data to connect di fone and PC.\n2. Select %1$s for di pop-up window.
To get di latest client, you fit visit %2$s on your PC.
Multi-Window Control Without Stress, No need Make You Pick di Fone
Di Drag-and-drop file sharing dey come with cross-device clipboard linking.
Hold an drag a file to transfer am from your fone to your PC.\n*On fones, dis feature dey supported for Gallery for AI and Di File Manager.
Cast Plenty apps at di same time, make you fit, for example, chat as you dey watch videos dem.\n*No be all PCs dey support am.
Screenshots or pictures dem you take for your fone go dey join together with your PC.
Actions for your fone go dey join together to your PC, just to avoid repetitive steps.
Pick one file den drag am go right with 3 fingers make you for easily and quickly transfer am go your PC.\n*On fones, dis feature dey supported for Gallery for AI and Di File Manager.
Dem fit paste di text wey you copy from your fone to your PC directly.
Cross-Device Copy Am Den Paste Am
Mirror your fone to PC or tablet and enjoy smooth cross-device copy-paste, file transfer, and backup for smart work and entertainment experience.
Siddon Enjoy Mobile Videos for Big Screen
Choose di devices wey fit find dis device.
Cast your fone to tablet to see am for widescreen. You fit continue dey use your fone and e no go disturb di cast.
Mirror your fone to PC or tablet and enjoy smooth cross-device copy-paste, file transfer, and backup for smart work and entertainment experience. For everytin about am, check di %1$s.
Cast fone videos to your computer, and you no go fit miss everytin.
Use di Many App Windows to chat for WhatsApp wen you dey play game.
Easily drag and drop files to transfer dem. Copy content for one device and paste am for anoda one.
See di fone content for big screen and control your fone direct from di tablet.
Once your fone and tablet don connect, you fit copy and paste text across dem. \nCopy content for one device and paste am fast-fast for di oda.
You neva add devices wey you trust
On Am Di Extension For Fone Screen make you fit enjoy immersive, big-screen viewing. To dey do oda tasks for the fone no go interrupt the extended show.
Connection Wey Fit Join Multiple Devices > Many-Screen Connection
Screen casting and extension, to dey share data, etc. from your fone and tablet or PC.
You fit answer and make calls for your PC or tablet wen your fone get call.
You fit view and reply messages dem from your fone on your PC or tablet.
Copy and paste text, fotos, and extra across devices.
Swipe Right with 3 Fingers to Send Files Wey Don Select
Transfer fotos, videos, files, and extra tins to your PC. Transfer big files fast-fast and you no go use data.
Double-tap with 3 Fingers to Copy Am to PC Clipboard
Copy fotos, videos, files, and extra to di PC clipboard for smooth cross-device pasting for PCs wey don connect.
Get, see, and manage di fone alats direct for your PC or tablet for smooth cross-device alats.
Allow devices wey don connect to use dis device fone data for network.
Fast trigger screen mirroring, to dey copy cross-device, file transfer, and extra wen you use controls for gesture.
Pinch am inside and Swipe with 3 Fingers to Start Mirroring Fast-fast
Mirror your fone screen fast-fast to di PC wen you dey use controls for gesture.
Only Devices Dem Wey Dem Trust
Devices wey dem trust and devices wey don sign in to di same account
Comot %1$s from devices wey you trust?
You no need to ask again wen you dey connect dis device.
Show di phone to a PC for big screen viewing and sharp-sharp file transfer without using data. Agree to dese permissions, wey dey needed, for only di functions wey dey needed.
Na only to sync notifications from your phone to your PC, e no dey upload to the server.
You fit copy fotos, videos, texts, etc. to your PC\'s clipboard den paste dem directly from your PC.
You fit copy fotos, videos, and oda files wey dey to your PC\'s clipboard den paste dem directly from your PC.
To Copy to PC Clipboard Make you Press-twice with 3 Fingers
You fit transfer fotos, videos, files, etc from your fone to your PC. You fit open di fone mirroring window on your PC too.
You fit transfer fotos, videos, files, etc to your PC. To send big files fast-fast without data dey supported too.
Move Right with 3 Fingers to Send di Files Wey don Select
You fit send fotos, videos, etc. from your fone to your PC with movements. To send big files fast-fast without data dey supported too.
Abeg check di connection status for your PC
No fit connect am to di device
Abeg open di QR code page on di PC.
Scan di QR code make e connect.
Connection don cut. Abeg make sure say %1$s don install for your PC
Keep your fone close to your PC.
Make sure say Bluetooth and Wi-Fi dey on for your PC.
Make sure say Bluetooth and Wi-Fi dey on for your fone.
\"%1$s\" don reject di connection to di fone. Abeg connect again.
Dey don copy di link wey dem share to clipboard.
You fit use your fone as extended screen for your PC so dat you fit better work experience on different-different screen.

Use your fone as extended screen for your PC so dat you fit get better work experience for different-different screen. Abeg make sure Bluetooth and Wi-Fi dey on for your fone and PC. Dis function no dey chop data.
Transfer for di file don fail
After you connect, you fit use features for multi-device collaboration like Screen Mirroring and File Transfer.
Use movements make you allow screen mirroring one time to di computer.
Zoom and Move Right with 3 Fingers so dat You Fit On Mirroring Quick-quick
Zoom in den move with 3 fingers to connect di fone screen to your PC.
You fit visit %1$s on your PC to get the latest client
Dey don copy di link go clipboard
Put di fone on di PC NFC chip wey support dis feature to connect.\nAbeg check if di fone dey support NFC first.
For to connect device using %1$s, you gats open di PC client, make sure say di Wi-Fi and Bluetooth dey on for di fone and PC, and den keep di screen on and without lock.
To get di latest client, you fit visit %1$s on your PC.

1. Press Scan to Connect on top PC client make e bring up QR code.\n2. Move down from di top right side of di fone screen to reach Control centa, make you long press PC Connection to go PC Connection page, and press di Scan button for upper right corner to scan di QR code make e connect.
1. Move down from di top right side of di fone to reach Control centa and select PC Connection.\n2. Choose di device you want to connect to in di pop-up window.\n3. Choose Allow Connection on di PC.
1. Use di standard cable for data to connect di fone and PC.\n2. Select PC Connection in di window wey pop-up.
You wan accept di pairing request from \"%1$s\"?
Abeg make sure say dem don on di PC Wi-Fi and Bluetooth to use dis feature.
You no dey see di device you wan connect for here?
After di connection, you fit use features like Screen Mirroring and File Transfer without chopping data.
After you connect, you fit use features for multi-device collaboration like Screen Mirroring and File Transfer.
E don copy to di PC clipboard
Device wey dey connected now no get dis feature
Connection Don Cut: Abeg make sure di PC Client don dey Installed
You fit go www.pcconnection.online to download and install
Connection don cut. Abeg connect to di device again as e don talk.
Connection don cut. Abeg install di PC client first
Abeg, no forget to always on Bluetooth and Wi-Fi so Say fit work well-well %1$s
%1$s go dey on automatic disable in %2$s minute(s)
To use %1$s or %2$s, abeg make sure say dey don download di matching PC client from %3$s and dey don install am.
To use %1$s, abeg make sure say dey don download di PC client from %2$s and dey don install am.
Once e dey connected, you fit use Screen Mirroring.
You fit send files between your PC and your fone without using data.
Abeg check if di fone dey support NFC first.\nPut di fone on di PC NFC chip wey support dis feature to connect.
Alat Me Only wen E Dey Cast
Pull am down to load am again
Di page don finish to refresh
Release am to Load am again
Abeg choose one time wey don pass
Di highest character limit don reach
E don connect to anoda device now. If you continue to dey on di Fone Collaboration, di connection with di device go disconnect.
E don fail to connect am. Abeg try am again.
Tap di Scanner for your fone Control Centa, and do scan for di QR code wey dey up to connect am to di tablet.
Dem dey only use am to connect to tablets or PCs.
Dem dey only use am to connect devices dem through QR code scanning.

Welcome to %1$s! Once you connect am, your tablet fit work as extra screen for your PC, make you do two-screen work and copy-paste between di devices without fone data. We go need dis permissions dem:
Dem dey only use am to connect to PCs dem wey near.
Dem dey only use am to show connection condition.
Share your fone screen with di tablet and open di screen mirroring window for di tablet.
Abeg connect your fone and %1$s to the same network, den turn on again.
E no Connect to di Same Network
Cast your fone screen to tablet to see am for big-screen. Use your fone directly from di tablet, and you no go use fone data. Dis permissions dem dey necessary and dem go only use am on di feature.
Allow make di app use di following permissions dem only to see and connect to tablets and show di connection condition.
Di Connection For Device and Di Fone Casting
After you connect, SubDisplay for PC dey available, and you fit use your tablet as extended screen for your PC.
Di Allow To Dey Share Call feature don off for your fone. Abeg go Settins > Connection Wey Fit Join Multiple Devices > Many-Screen Connection to on am and get alats for calls dem.
Wen your fone and tablet don connect, you fit copy and paste text across di devices. Copy content for one device, and paste am direct for di oda device.
Before you use %1$s extend di screen, abeg make sure say di %2$s client don install for di PC. To download di client, go %3$s.
Wen e don on, you go fit find fone devices and connect am by di PC.
After you connect, %1$s dey available, and you fit use your tablet as extended screen for your PC and do extra tins.
To use %3$s connect devices, you go need on Wi-Fi and Bluetooth and open di %1$s client on di PC, on %2$s ontop di fone device, and make sure di fone device screen dey open and dey on.
To use di following features, you go need on Wi-Fi and Bluetooth on di PC and open di %1$s client. If dis client never install on di PC, go %2$s to download and install am.
Di time for waiting don tey pass wetin pipo expect. You fit continue dey wait or try anoda way to connect.
Abeg allow di connection on di PC client for to continue.
Use your tablet as extra screen for your PC. Work for two screens anytime, anywhere, to make you work wella. Di tablet and PC dey share di clipboard, as e dey copy one and pasting on di oda.
Use your tablet as extra screen for your PC. Work for two screens anytime, anywhere, to make you work wella. Di tablet and PC dey share di clipboard, as e dey copy one and pasting on di oda.
Dem dey use to find and den connect to device dem wey close.
Abeg give am all permissions dem to use PC Connection.
Allow dis app to use di following permissions dem (for PC connection, file transfer, and show of transfer progress only).
Join device dem and send files
Dem dey only use am to show di level for file transfers.
Wetin you dey do for di fone no go disturb di screen casting.
On %1$s for deep big-screen experience. Oda work for di fone no go disturb di casting.
Open di screen mirroring window for di tablet.
To join di Matter device, abeg scan am to get di joining code first.

1. Tap Scan am to Connect ontop PC client make e bring up QR code.\n2. Swipe down from di up right side of di fone device to bring up Control Centa, press %1$s long (%2$s for tablets) to go di %1$s page, tap di Scan button on di up right corner, and scan di QR code to connect.
Choose %2$s > Scan am to Connect in %1$s, and put di QR code inside di frame to do scan.
Chat and watch video at once with di function for split-screen.
FastCopy gesture don on. Go to %1$s to connect am to your PC, and you fit paste am directly for your PC.
Di Mirroring gesture don on. Go to %1$s to connect am go your PC, and e go mirror your fone screen go di PC, which go on data sharing between di devices.
Di FastSend gesture don on. Go %1$s to connect to your PC and start to dey transfer di files wey don select.
Copy and paste sharp-sharp to computer wey get three-finger double-tap.
Move am sideways with three fingers to send di chosen files sharp-sharp to computer wey dey connected.
Abeg install di PC client first
E don copy URL. Abeg visit and download for di PC.
Abeg make sure say di PC client don install for PC, then connect di cable again. Di link for download: %1$s

Wen e don connect to 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi network, to dey use %1$s fit cause make e slow. Dem advise make you switch Wi-Fi to di 5 GHz band or disconnect am from Wi-Fi (make di Wi-Fi toggle still dey on) to improve how e dey work.
E go work well wen you don connect to di same Wi-Fi network
